methodology.anomaly_rule: absolute price change >=20% and robust MAD z-score >=3.5
methodology.comparison: adjacent healthy snapshot dates matched by stable retailer listing key
methodology.completeness: daily shard files contain every comparable regular-price change without a display cap
methodology.missingness: an item must have finite positive regular prices on both dates; gaps are not changes

scope: Gala Fresh Baldwin public online regular prices; not asserted as physical shelf prices
